title: adenochlaena leucocephala
intro: Adenochlaena leucocephala, also known as the Centella or Gotu Kola, is a type of herb native to Asia and Australia, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to promote skin health, reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system, offering several health benefits such as wound healing, improved memory, and stress relief. In herbal preparations, Adenochlaena leucocephala is often used in teas, capsules, and topical creams, and is also used as a dietary supplement to support overall well-being.
